cta.title: Command the Most Powerful Rolls-Royce
cta.description: Experience the Wraith's perfect balance of luxury and performance. Book now for exclusive track day access.

wraith.relatedSubtitle: Experience the Wraith with our premium services

events.title: Events & Red Carpet
events.desc: The Wraith's dramatic fastback silhouette makes it the ultimate statement car for galas and premieres.

photoshoot.title: Photoshoot Service
photoshoot.desc: The Wraith's Starlight Headliner and bold coupe lines are perfect for dramatic editorial and fashion shoots.

chauffeur.title: Chauffeur Service
chauffeur.desc: Professional chauffeur with the fastest Rolls-Royce. Hourly and daily packages available.

phantom.relatedSubtitle: Experience the Phantom with our premium services

wedding.title: Wedding Service
wedding.desc: The Phantom is the world's most prestigious wedding car. White Extended Wheelbase with floral decoration and red carpet.

corporate.title: Corporate Service
corporate.desc: Impress clients and VIPs with the flagship Phantom. Perfect for board-level transport and executive entertainment.

airport.title: Airport Transfer
airport.desc: First-class airport arrival in the Phantom. Meet & greet at DXB with flight tracking and complimentary waiting.

ghost.relatedSubtitle: Experience the Ghost with our premium services

corporate.title: Corporate Service
corporate.desc: The Ghost is our #1 choice for executive transport and CEO transfers in DIFC & Business Bay.

chauffeur.title: Chauffeur Service
chauffeur.desc: Professional multilingual chauffeur with your Ghost rental. Hourly from AED 800.

airport.title: Airport Transfer
airport.desc: VIP airport pickup in a Ghost. Meet & greet at DXB with flight tracking included.

cullinan.relatedSubtitle: Experience the Cullinan with our premium services

tours.title: Desert Safari Tours
tours.desc: The Cullinan is the ultimate luxury SUV for desert adventures and scenic tours across the UAE.

corporate.title: Corporate Service
corporate.desc: Impress with the world's most luxurious SUV. Perfect for executive transport and VIP guests.

chauffeur.title: Chauffeur Service
chauffeur.desc: Professional chauffeur with the Cullinan. Spacious luxury for families and groups.

cta.title: Feel the Dubai Breeze in a Dawn
cta.description: Book now and receive a complimentary sunset drive route map and professional photography session

dawn.relatedSubtitle: Experience the Dawn with our premium services

photoshoot.title: Photoshoot Service
photoshoot.desc: The Dawn's open-top elegance is perfect for fashion shoots and content creation along Dubai's coastline.

tours.title: City Tours
tours.desc: Explore Dubai's stunning landmarks in the open-top Dawn. The ultimate sightseeing experience.

wedding.title: Wedding Service
wedding.desc: The Dawn convertible adds a magical open-air touch to wedding celebrations.

spectre.relatedSubtitle: Experience the Spectre with our premium services

corporate.title: Corporate Service
corporate.desc: Make a statement with the world's first ultra-luxury electric car. Perfect for eco-conscious executives.

tours.title: Silent City Tours
tours.desc: Experience Dubai in whisper-silent luxury. The Spectre offers the quietest way to explore the city.

chauffeur.title: Chauffeur Service
chauffeur.desc: Professional chauffeur with the electric Spectre. Zero emissions, maximum luxury.

phantomPage.heroSubtitle: Experience the pinnacle of luxury with Dubai's most prestigious vehicle. The Phantom delivers an unparalleled combination of craftsmanship, technology, and comfort.
phantomPage.featuresSubtitle: Every detail crafted to perfection, every feature designed for your ultimate comfort
